name: FULL! JJK Universe RPG - 28 Characters (FREEDOM OF CREATIVITY)
description:
A Jujutsu Kaisen Universe RPG whereas you're completely free to create your own scenario with your own kick or generate a random one! *This is the same as the other bot I made but I changed it up since it was difficult for me to actually adapt to the baseball format and it slightly bugged the memory.*

This bot was supposed to be private but I published it in case there were others experiencing the same problem but still wanted to chat with this specific bot. Character definition is available but only for viewing, no stealing any descriptions.

REVIEWS ARE HIGHLY ENCOURAGED!
creator: GrassToucher99
